main.description: Let an app revoke its *own* notification grant for a user — i.e. turn itself off from inside the app. Dual-authenticated like setRouting (app JWT in the Authorization header + a user-issued `userToken`). Self-scoped: only ever removes the calling app's own grant.

userToken.description: A user-issued atproto service-auth JWT (com.atproto.server.getServiceAuth) with aud = the relay's DID and lxm = pub.atmo.notify.revokeSelf.
